title: Lemon's Harpoons
description: Replaces Tridents with Harpoons (CEM mod required)
body:
This resource pack replaces Tridents with Harpoons. A CEM mod such as Optifine is required. All of the textures and models are made by me.
The pack probably works for earlier and later versions, but I'm too lazy to check :P

Edit 03-01-24: As far as I can tell Traben's EMF mod currently doesn't support trident models so you'll have to wait for it to be added or use a different CEM mod
